name: Samsung 990 Pro 2TB
description: The Samsung 990 Pro 2TB is a premium PCIe 4.0 NVMe M.2 solid-state drive built for hardcore gamers, content creators, and heavy workloads. It pushes the absolute limits of the Gen4 interface, offering blazing-fast loading and rendering speeds, exceptional power efficiency, and industry-leading hardware endurance.

name: WD Black SN850X 1TB
description: The WD Black SN850X 1TB is a high-performance PCIe Gen4 NVMe internal SSD built for elite gaming and heavy workloads. It delivers blistering sequential read speeds of up to 7,300 MB/s and write speeds of up to 6,300 MB/s, vastly reducing game load times and system latency.
